findings.description: business_days_between fully materializes day_range (N date objects + N-element list) then re-walks it to count weekdays, where a closed-form (days//7*5 + boundary remainder) is O(1) with zero allocation — only matters if multi-year spans are passed by report/SLA callers.

day_range returns a fully-materialized list rather than yielding; callers that only iterate (e.g. business_days_between) pay full allocation cost for a span they immediately discard — a generator variant would let consumers avoid the buffer.

parse_iso_date uses datetime.strptime with a format string; for the fixed YYYY-MM-DD case date.fromisoformat is the C-fast path and avoids format-string interpretation per call — micro-optimization, only relevant under high parse volume.
